message: goal_git create_pr recomputed gateVerdictHash without the local release gate component used during authorization, so a valid ReleaseAuthorization could fail validation at PR time.
resolution: goal_git now reruns the local release gate immediately before PR creation/dry-run and validates the authorization against the same evaluator plus localReleaseGate hash used by goal-authorize-release.

message: goal_git used restored state.finalizationPolicy, which can be stale after event replay and deny PR dry-run even when the current project .pi/settings.json allows it.
resolution: goal_git refreshes finalization policy from the current working directory settings on each invocation before computing git capabilities.

message: Independent adversarial release-flow review returned no blocker/high findings for the structured PR body and dry-run changes.
resolution: Review command returned {"findings":[]}; Ousterhout pass exceeded the bounded window, followed by local design cleanup moving validation-result parsing into release/pr-body.ts.
